advisor.top_issue: The most important issue is that the GPU may not be used effectively.
advisor.summary: This run looks like the model is not fully reaching the GPU path during inference.
evidence: Peak VRAM usage stayed low at 8.5% of available VRAM.
recommendations: Check the GPU acceleration setting in Ollama or LM Studio.
Check NVIDIA driver and CUDA health.
Run the same benchmark again while the GPU path is confirmed active.
